Id1.text: Adam Holloway, a member of the UK Conservative Party, was born in Kent and graduated from Magdalene College, Cambridge.

Id2.text: Kent born Adam Holloway, who studied at Magdalene College Cambridge, is a member of the UK Conservative Party.

Id3.text: Adam Holloway was born in Kent and his alma mater is Magdalene College, Cambridge. He is a member of the Conservative Party in the UK.
